name: LARYNGEAL CYST
definition: rare benign pharyngeal cyst of vallecula / vocal cord / epiglottis
dominant_finding: smoothly hemispheric mass ± distortion of coated surfaces of pharyngeal / laryngeal
discriminating_features: smoothly hemispheric mass ± distortion of coated surfaces of pharyngeal / laryngeal

general: smoothly hemispheric mass ± distortion of coated surfaces of pharyngeal / laryngeal
